title: go-perf-agent hotspots
description: Ranked hot symbols written to .go-perf-agent/hotspots.json by `hotspots`. A JSON array of one object per (symbol, metric), sorted by weight. Read by the orchestrator and gpa-analyst. Shape mirrors internal/hotspot.Hotspot.

rank.description: 1-based rank by weight_pct within the run

package.description: repo-relative package dir, or "" if not ours (stdlib/vendor)

weight_pct.description: share of its metric total (per-metric normalized percent)

candidate.description: editable AND in_scope - the set the analyst works
